summary.shape_sentence: Morning expansion up into late-morning highs, then a sustained afternoon liquidation into a weak lower close.

goat.note: No visible GOAT label plotted; standout move was the sustained afternoon selloff from the lunch lower high toward LOD.

red_circles.behavior: No clearly visible red-circle labels; bearish behavior clustered after the late-morning high and lunch lower high.

green_circles.behavior: No clearly visible green-circle labels; late bullish attempts were shallow and failed to reclaim structure.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No visible orange bank icons; effective supply around 25600-25645 was respected after lunch.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No visible blue bank icons; demand around 25380-25400 broke late, while 25315-25340 produced only a modest bounce.

time_markers.10am_blue: High-volatility morning rotation after the opening spike; price remained above the open but lacked clean trend continuity.
time_markers.12pm_red: Lower high below the HOD; transition point from morning strength into distribution.
time_markers.2pm_green: Downside continuation with sellers controlling lower-high/lower-low structure.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed below the open and near the lower third after a small rebound from LOD.

takeaway: Bearish reversal/trend day: early strength failed after late-morning highs, then lunch distribution led to a controlled afternoon liquidation and weak close near the lows.
